article_title: Refusal of Registration for Nonpayment of Toll Evasion Penalties

markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 3. REGISTRATION OF VEHICLES AND CERTIFICATES OF TITLE [4000 - 9808]
### Chapter 1. Original and Renewal of Registration; Issuance of Certificates of Title [4000 - 5506]
#### Article 6.5. Refusal of Registration for Nonpayment of Toll Evasion Penalties [4770 - 4775]
##### § 4775

No exemption from the payment of any fee imposed by this code is an exemption from the obligation of a registered owner or lessee to pay the full amount of toll evasion penalties and administrative fees pursuant to Section 4770.

*(Added by Stats. 1995, Ch. 739, Sec. 5. Effective January 1, 1996.)*

subsections.text: No exemption from the payment of any fee imposed by this code is an exemption from the obligation of a registered owner or lessee to pay the full amount of toll evasion penalties and administrative fees pursuant to Section 4770.
